The Fell Dragon King. He has awakened,
breaking a thousand-year seal. He desires the
12 rings for his own ambitions. Appears in
Fire Emblem Engage.

The prince of Grado who once had a promising
future. However, he met a tragic end at the
mercy of the Sacred Stones and the Demon
King, though his soul remained pure. Appears in
Fire Emblem: The Sacred Stones.

Mythic Effect: Anima
Boost: HP+5, Spd+4

Grants allies this Mythic Effect during Anima
season, if the Anima blessing has been conferred
and if this unit enters battle in Aether Raids with
them: Anima-blessed allies decrease the
Aetheric Lift lost for defense failures during
Anima season. (This decrease is limited to the
number of Mythic Heroes (Max: 2) × the number
of Heroes with the blessing conferred × 5.)

During Anima season, this Mythic Hero will
decrease Aetheric Lift loss for defense
failures depending on number of merges. (This
decrease is limited to the number of times the
units have been merged × 1 (Max: 20).)

Mythic Effect 2: Anima
Boost: Defensive Team Bonus

Mythic Effect 3: Anima
Boost: Defensive Team Call
(Details can be found in Edit Defensive Team.)

Legendary Effect: Earth
Ally Boost: HP+3, Atk+2

Grants allies this Legendary Effect
during Earth season, if the Earth
blessing has been conferred and if
this unit enters battle with them.

Standard Effect 1: Duel
If unit is 5★ and level 40 and unit's stats total
less than 220, treats unit's stats as 220 in
modes like Arena. (Higher-scoring opponents
will appear. Stat total calculation excludes any
values added by merges and skills.)
Standard Effect 2: Pair Up
An ability that can only be used under certain
circumstances. Pair Up can be accessed from
the Interact with Allies menu, and allows this
unit to join battle in a group with another ally.
His foes are buried with his power and\ncannot recover HP! Ends foes' actions\ninstantly. Even inflicts Share Spoils+!
Grants Dark Emblem status to allies\nand deploys his own Fell Barrier! His\nStyle sends foes to a vortex of despair!

$aAccelerates Special trigger (cooldown count-1).

Grants weapon-triangle advantage against
colorless foes, and inflicts weapon-triangle
disadvantage on colorless foes during combat.

At start of turn, and after unit acts (if Canto
triggers, after Canto), inflicts【Atk Shackle】,
【Res Shackle】, and【Discord】on closest
foes and any foe within 2 spaces of those foes
through their next actions.

As combat begins, deals damage to foe = X%
of the greater of unit's or foe's Atk (if unit has
weapon-triangle advantage or if unit's Res >
foe's Res, X = 40; otherwise, X = 20; activates
only when unit can attack in combat; effects
that reduce damage "during combat" do not
apply; will not reduce foe's HP below 1).

Grants Atk/Def/Res+16 to unit, unit deals +25
damage (excluding area-of-effect Specials),
and reduces damage from foe's attacks by
15 during combat (excluding area-of-effect
Specials).

【Atk Shackle】
Inflicts penalty on unit's Atk during combat =
number of Penalty effects active on unit + 4,
excluding stat penalties (max 8).

【Res Shackle】
Inflicts penalty on unit's Res during combat =
number of Penalty effects active on unit + 4,
excluding stat penalties (max 8).

【Discord】
Inflicts Atk/Spd/Def/Res-X on unit during
combat (X = 2 + number of allies within
2 spaces of unit; max 5).

$aAccelerates Special trigger (cooldown count-1).
Unit can counterattack regardless of foe's range.
If foe's Range = 2, calculates damage using the
lower of foe's Def or Res.

Grants Atk/Def/Res+16 to unit, neutralizes foe's
bonuses, unit deals +25 damage (excluding
area-of-effect Specials), reduces damage from
foe's attacks by 15 (excluding area-of-effect
Specials), reduces damage from foe's Specials
by an additional 15 (excluding area-of-effect
Specials), and unit makes a guaranteed
follow-up attack during combat.

Unit can use the following【Style】:
―――――― Howling Beam Style ――――――
Unit can attack foes within 5 spaces of unit
and 3 rows or 3 columns centered on unit
regardless of unit's range. Damage dealt by
unit's attacks and damage from foe's attacks
during that combat are reduced to 0, and foes'
Savior effects will not trigger. (Røkkr take at
least 1 damage.)

After combat, deals 20 damage to foe and
foes within 2 spaces of that foe and inflicts
【Deep Wounds】on those foes, and applies
【Divine Vein (Haze)】on foe's space and on
each space within 2 spaces of that space
for 1 turn.

Unit suffers a counterattack if any of the
following conditions are met: foe is armored,
foe can counterattack regardless of unit's
range, or foe's Range is the same as the
distance between unit and foe.

Unit cannot move or attack structures,
after-combat movement effects do not occur,
unit's area-of-effect Specials cannot be
triggered, and remaining movement granted
from Canto is treated as 0. Skill effect's Range
is treated as 1. This Style can be used only
once per turn.
――――――――――――――――――――――――

【Style】
Change Style using the Style button at the
bottom of the screen.

A unit's Style is only active when that unit
is taking an action. Style use is disabled when
unit is deployed using Pair Up or when unit is
equipped with multiple skills that have a Style.

【Deep Wounds】
Unit's HP cannot be healed through its
next action.

【Divine Vein (Haze)】
Applies the following effects on space:
Inflicts Atk/Spd/Def/Res-5 on foe and
neutralizes foe's bonuses during combat.

$aGrants Atk/Def/Res+10. When unit is in combat,
foes' Savior effects will not trigger.

At start of player phase or enemy phase,
grants【Anathema】and【Creation Pulse】
to unit and allies within 2 spaces of unit
for 1 turn.

Grants bonus to unit's Atk = unit's maximum
Special cooldown count × 3 and reduces
damage from foe's attacks by 7 during combat
(excluding area-of-effect Specials).

If unit initiates combat, after combat, inflicts
"after start-of-turn skills trigger, action ends
immediately" (for foes who have not yet taken
an action in Summoner Duels, instead of
inflicting this effect, ends their action
immediately),【Gravity】and【Share Spoils+】on
foes with the highest Spd within 3 spaces of
target foe (excluding target) through their
next actions.

【Anathema】
Inflicts Spd/Def/Res-4 on foes within 3 spaces
of unit during combat.

【Creation Pulse】
If unit's attack can trigger unit's Special, grants
Special cooldown count-X before unit's first
attack during combat (X = number of Penalty
effects active on foe, excluding stat penalties;
max 2).
(For 1 turn.)

【Gravity】
Restricts target's movement to 1 space through
its next action.

【Share Spoils+】
Inflicts Atk/Spd/Def/Res-5 on unit during
combat and neutralizes "reduces damage
by X%" effects from unit's non-Special skills
(excluding area-of-effect Specials).

Once per turn for the entire map, if foe
initiates combat and if unit is defeated in
combat, grants another action to that foe
after combat (this effect has priority over
other similar effects aside from Share Spoils;
if this status and Share Spoils are both active
at the same time, they are both treated as
having been triggered; other similar effects
aside from Share Spoils are treated as not
having triggered).

$aGrants Atk/Def/Res+10. When unit is in combat,
foes' Savior effects will not trigger.

grants【Anathema】and【Creation Pulse】

inflicting this effect, ends their action
immediately),【Gravity】and【Share Spoils+】on

target foe (excluding target) through their
next actions.

If foe initiates combat or foe's HP ≥ 75% at
start of combat, grants Atk/Def/Res+10 to unit
and reduces damage from foe's first attack by
7 during combat ("first attack" normally means
only the first strike; for effects that grant "unit
attacks twice," it means the first and second
strikes), and also, if unit's Def ≥ foe's Def+5,
disables unit's and foe's skills that change
attack priority during combat.

$aEnables【Canto (１)】.

For foes on the map whose Res < unit's Res at
start of combat, inflicts Atk/Res-X (max 7)
during combat and those foes cannot recover
HP during or after combat (when an effect
such as【Feud】is triggered for allies,
excluding unit, that effect will also neutralize
this skill's "cannot recover HP after combat"
effect on their foes; X = number of types of
【Bonus】effects, excluding stat bonuses, and
【Penalty】effects, excluding stat penalties,
active on player team and enemy team).

Inflicts Atk/Res-4 on foe, deals damage = 20%
of unit's Res (excluding area-of-effect Specials),
and reduces damage from foe's attacks by 20%
of unit's Res during combat (excluding
area-of-effect Specials).

【Canto (１)】
After an attack, Assist skill, or structure
destruction, unit can move １ space(s).

(Unit moves according to movement type. Once
per turn. Cannot attack or assist. Only highest
value applied. Does not stack. After moving,
if a skill that grants another action would be
triggered (like with Galeforce), Canto will
trigger after the granted action. Unit's base
movement has no effect on movement granted.
Cannot warp (using skills like Wings of Mercy)
a distance greater than unit would be able to
move with normal Canto movement.)

【Feud】
Disables all ally skills (excluding unit's) during
combat through unit's next action.

【Bonus】
All effects that last "for 1 turn" or "that turn
only." Includes bonuses granted by a skill
like Rally or Hone and positive status effects
(extra movement or effects like Dominance).

【Penalty】
All effects that last "on foe through its next
action." Includes penalties inflicted by a skill
like Panic or Threaten and negative status
effects (preventing counterattacks, restricting
movement, or the effects of a skill like
Triangle Adept or Guard).

$aEnables【Canto (１)】.

For foes on the map whose Res < unit's Res at
start of combat, inflicts Atk/Res-X (max 7)
during combat and those foes cannot recover
HP during or after combat (when an effect
such as【Feud】is triggered for allies,
excluding unit, that effect will also neutralize
this skill's "cannot recover HP after combat"
effect on their foes; X = number of types of
【Bonus】effects, excluding stat bonuses, and
【Penalty】effects, excluding stat penalties,
active on player team and enemy team).

and reduces damage from foe's attacks by 20%

$aUnit's Savior effects will not trigger.

At start of player phase or enemy phase, grants
【Dark Emblem】to allies on the map for 1 turn
and grants【Imbue】and "reduces damage from
area-of-effect Specials by 80% (excluding
Røkkr area-of-effect Specials)" to unit and
allies within 2 spaces of unit for 1 turn.

Neutralizes【Dark Emblem】granted to unit.

Grants bonus to unit's Atk/Def/Res = number of
allies on the map with【Dark Emblem】active
× 2, + 5 (max 11), unit deals +7 damage
(excluding area-of-effect Specials), reduces
damage from foe's attacks by 7 (excluding
area-of-effect Specials), and grants Special
cooldown count-2 to unit before foe's first
attack during combat.

If there is an ally on the map with【Dark Emblem】
active and if none of the units on player team
have been defeated on the current turn (player
phase and enemy phase counted separately),
calculates damage from foe's attacks at 50%
(excluding area-of-effect Specials; this
calculation stacks with other effects that
calculate damage at X% such as Potent
Follow), and any "reduces damage by X%"
effect that can be triggered a limited number
of times by unit's equipped Special can be
triggered multiple times without limitation
during combat (includes effects such as the
"once per combat" from Armored Floe and
"twice per combat" from Armored Ice Cap;
does not include damage reductions for the
"first attack," etc.; excludes boosted Special
effects from engaging).

【Dark Emblem】
Grants Atk/Spd/Def/Res+5 during combat.

【Imbue】
Reduces the effect of【Deep Wounds】on unit by
50% during combat, and restores 40% of unit's
maximum HP as unit's combat begins for 1 turn
(triggers after effects that deal damage as
combat begins; only highest value applied;
does not stack).

【Deep Wounds】
Unit's HP cannot be healed through its
next action.

Marquess Caelin learned through a
letter from his daughter that she and
a man she eloped with from Sacae
bore a child. However, she and her
husband had already passed, and his
granddaughter, Lyn, was on a journey
with Mark, the wandering strategist
in training. The marquess sent his
knights to search for her, and they
luckily found her at a trading city
in Sacae.

Jahn sought out the person
responsible for resurrecting the
Demon Dragon and eventually
met with the king of Bern, Zephiel.
Zephiel kept the Demon Dragon
at his side in the form of the Dark
Priestess, and he claimed he wished
to return the land to the dragons.
Jahn agreed to conspire with him,
no questions asked...

Roy foiled Zephiel's ambitions and
went on to pursue the Dark Priestess
to the Dragon Temple. There, Jahn
informed Roy of the Demon Dragon's
true identity: Idunn. She was once a
Divine Dragon, but had been twisted
and remade by her fellow dragons to
become the Demon Dragon...

Hartmut, hero of the Scouring and
original master of the Binding Blade,
had taken pity on Idunn. The Binding
Blade stopped short of slaying her,
and she was sealed away instead.
Jahn, himself a dragon, could not
see the mercy in this act, and his
conviction that humans and
dragons could not coexist only
grew stronger...

Roy then met Fae, a survivor of the
Divine Dragon tribe, in a place called
Arcadia, a hidden village in the desert
where humans and dragons live in
harmony. Having learned the full
story of the two peoples, Roy sought
a world in which humans and dragons
could live side by side. Jahn, refusing
to believe such a world was possible,
fell before Roy's advance...

Even after Zephiel's death, Idunn did
not abandon his cause. Roy stood
against her, brandishing the Binding
Blade in combat against the Demon
Dragon once more. She survived the
ordeal, once again spared by human
hands, and is said to have been seen
in Arcadia, spending her days at Fae's
side and recovering what she had
once lost.
